title: Post-Graduate Diploma in Data Science with Artificial Intelligence
content: M.Tech.* MCA/ MSc (CS/IT/ allied branches) B.Tech.(CSE/IT/ECE) / BE (CSE/IT/ECE) BCA/B.Sc. (Computer Science/Information Technology)# *Working professionals in AI/Data Science field with minimum 3 years of experience #Working professionals in AI/Data Science field with minimum 5 years of experience Graduates of PG Diploma in Data Science will have career opportunities such as: 01 To provide learners with strong foundations in Statistics, Probability, and Data Analytics. 02 To develop expertise in Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, and Predictive Modelling. 03 To equip students with programming skills in Python/R and data handling using SQL and Big Data tools. 04 To train students in real-world data visualization, dashboarding, and business intelligence applications. 05 To foster industry readiness through hands-on labs, case studies, and capstone projects. 06 To prepare graduates for professional certifications, higher education, research, and leadership roles in analytics domains. M.Tech.* MCA/ MSc (CS/IT/ allied branches) B.Tech.(CSE/IT/ECE) / BE (CSE/IT/ECE) BCA/B.Sc. (Computer Science/Information Technology)# *Working professionals in AI/Data Science field with minimum 3 years of experience #Working professionals in AI/Data Science field with minimum 5 years of experience
